title: Python headers.py: Removed length checks may cause parsing exceptions
description: In python/src/lichen/schc/headers.py, the changes removed minimum length checks (e.g., 'if len(raw) < HEADER_LENGTH + ...' guards) from _CoapUdpProfile.matches(), _RplProfile.matches(), and Icmpv6EchoProfile.matches(). While IPv6Header.from_bytes() will raise on truncated input, the exception is caught, but the explicit early-return-False was clearer for code maintainers. Not a correctness bug but a minor code clarity regression.
